name: Steamed Beef Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the beef, lite soy sauce, chopped cilantro, minced ginger root, cornstarch, and peanut oil.
2. Place 10 wonton wrappers on a work surface.
3. Place about 2 teaspoons of filling in the center of each wonton wrapper.
4. Moisten the edges of each wonton wrapper with water.
5. Lift both sides of the wrapper and pinch together above the stuffing, gathering up the edges and pleating the wrappers. Pinch to seal.
6. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
7. Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in two large skillets.
8. Reduce heat to medium and add the dumplings. Do not allow them to touch the bottom of the skillet.
9. Cover lightly and steam until the dumplings are firm and the wrappers are soft, about 15 minutes.
10. Serve immediately.
11. Garnish the serving platter with scallion fans and radish flower.
